_note: Sample + template data for Phase 2 RTI. Sample RTIs use internal_ref SAMPLE-RTI-* and reminders are titled 'Sample: …' so they are clearly not real records and are replaced on every seed run.

templates.title: Work order copy
default_questions: Provide a certified copy of the work order for the work [WORK / JOB NUMBER] in [WARD].
Provide the name, address and registration details of the contractor to whom the work was awarded.
Provide the sanctioned estimate and the date of the work order.

templates.title: Estimate copy
default_questions: Provide a certified copy of the detailed estimate for [WORK / JOB NUMBER] in [WARD].
Provide the technical sanction and administrative approval for the said estimate.
State the rate analysis used and the approving authority.

templates.title: Measurement Book (MB) copy
default_questions: Provide a certified copy of the Measurement Book entries for [WORK / JOB NUMBER] in [WARD].
Provide the name and designation of the officer who recorded and check-measured the entries.
Provide the dates on which measurements were recorded and check-measured.

templates.title: Tender documents
default_questions: Provide certified copies of the tender notification, tender documents and bid comparison statement for [WORK / JOB NUMBER].
Provide the list of bidders and the evaluation criteria applied.
Provide the date of award and the value of the awarded contract.

templates.title: Contractor eligibility & registration
default_questions: Provide the contractor registration class and validity for the contractor of [WORK / JOB NUMBER].
Provide documents establishing the contractor's eligibility for the said work.
State whether the contractor was blacklisted at any time and, if so, the details.

templates.title: Quality control / third-party inspection report
default_questions: Provide a certified copy of the quality-control / third-party inspection report for [WORK / JOB NUMBER] in [WARD].
Provide the name and designation of the officer responsible for quality control.
Provide before-and-after photographs and the completion certificate.

rtis.subject: Pothole repair work — Ward road, status and work order
rtis.info_requested:
1. Provide a certified copy of the work order for the pothole repair work on [ROAD NAME].
2. Provide the name and registration details of the contractor.
3. Provide the date of completion and the completion certificate.

rtis.subject: Garbage contractor details and payment for the ward
rtis.info_requested:
1. Provide the name of the garbage-collection contractor for the ward.
2. Provide the monthly payments released to the contractor for the last 12 months.
3. Provide the attendance / trip records of the collection vehicles.

rtis.subject: Drain construction — measurement book and quality control
rtis.info_requested:
1. Provide a certified copy of the Measurement Book entries for the drain construction.
2. Provide the quality-control inspection report.
3. Provide the name of the check-measuring officer.
rtis.reply_summary: PIO provided only the work order; MB entries and QC report not furnished.

rtis.subject: Tender irregularity in footpath works — full tender file
rtis.info_requested:
1. Provide the complete tender file for the footpath works.
2. Provide the bid comparison statement and evaluation notes.
3. Provide the file movement and approval notings.
rtis.reply_summary: PIO denied citing third-party information; appeal filed.

rtis.subject: Dangerous open electrical junction box — immediate hazard
rtis.info_requested:
1. Provide the action taken to make safe the open electrical junction box at [LOCATION].
2. Provide the name of the officer responsible for streetlight maintenance in the ward.

first_appeals.grounds_detail: MB entries and QC report were not provided within the statutory period.
Section 8(1)(d) wrongly invoked for a public-works tender.
first_appeals.decision_summary: FAA directed the PIO to furnish the tender file but the records remain incomplete.

second_appeals.reason_detail: FAA order not complied with; records still withheld.

reminders.title: Sample: follow up on RTI reply
Sample: file first appeal
reminders.description: Partial reply received — appeal window open.
